Native baseline: v4=1.626e+6 ops/s, GenoID pool=1.227e+7 ops/s (7.5x faster), structured=527,565.3 ops/s (3.1x slower vs v4).

results.RNG source: Pooled OS CSPRNG draws (64 UUIDs/call) + byte-level GA crossover/mutation
Pooled CSPRNG + declared v8 layout (timestamp/shard/monotonic-counter) + field-boundary crossover + constraint repair
